data.expectedOutcome: User reaches the final step, refines text with AI successfully, and the Auth Choice Dialog appears upon submission.

data.action: navigate: Start Your Marketing Engine link
data.intent: Navigate to the narrative creation page.

visionDecision.reasoning: The prime objective is to start the narrative wizard, so I need to navigate to /narrative/new/business. Since I'm on the homepage, I can navigate to /narrative/new by clicking the 'Start Narrative' link, and then navigate to the business narrative wizard specifically.
visionDecision.visualContext: I am on the homepage and need to start the narrative creation process.

targetElement.description: Start Your Marketing Engine link

visionDecision.intent: Navigate to the narrative creation page.

data.action: click: Business / Brand Identity
data.intent: Navigating to the Business Narrative Wizard

visionDecision.reasoning: The mission requires navigating to /narrative/new/business and starting the narrative wizard.  The 'Business / Brand Identity' option seems most appropriate for that.
visionDecision.visualContext: The page shows two options: Business/Brand Identity and Story/Video Series. We need to choose Business/Brand Identity to fulfill the mission.

targetElement.description: Business / Brand Identity

visionDecision.intent: Navigating to the Business Narrative Wizard

data.action: navigate: Link 7: Start With Narrative Setup -> http://localhost:3000/narrative/new (w-full py-4 rounded-2xl font-black text-center transition-all active:scale-95 bg-white text-black hover:bg-slate-200)
data.intent: Navigate to the narrative creation page.

visionDecision.reasoning: The mission requires navigating to /narrative/new/business to start the narrative wizard. The current page is the landing page. I can use the link "Start Narrative", "Start Your Marketing Engine", or any of the plan upgrade links to start the narrative setup. I'll choose the one on the free plan "Start With Narrative Setup"
visionDecision.visualContext: The landing page has a link to start the narrative creation process, which is the next step in completing the mission.

targetElement.description: Link 7: Start With Narrative Setup -> http://localhost:3000/narrative/new (w-full py-4 rounded-2xl font-black text-center transition-all active:scale-95 bg-white text-black hover:bg-slate-200)

visionDecision.intent: Navigate to the narrative creation page.
